theorem candidate_T1_free (Ōá : Character G) (hŌá : Ōá ‚Č† 1) :
    ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) = 0 := by
  classical
  by_contra hsum
  let S : ‚Ąā := ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)
  have hS : S ‚Č† 0 := by
    simpa [S] using hsum
  have hŌá_ne_one_at_inv : Ōá ((Classical.choose (Character.exists_ne_one_of_ne_one hŌá))‚ĀĽ¬Ļ) ‚Č† (1 : ‚Ąā) := by
    intro hEq
    have hpoint : Ōá (Classical.choose (Character.exists_ne_one_of_ne_one hŌá)) = (1 : ‚Ąā) := by
      have hmul : Ōá ((Classical.choose (Character.exists_ne_one_of_ne_one hŌá))‚ĀĽ¬Ļ) *
          Ōá (Classical.choose (Character.exists_ne_one_of_ne_one hŌá)) = (1 : ‚Ąā) := by
        simpa using Ōá.map_mul ((Classical.choose (Character.exists_ne_one_of_ne_one hŌá))‚ĀĽ¬Ļ)
          (Classical.choose (Character.exists_ne_one_of_ne_one hŌá))
      have hleft : Ōá ((Classical.choose (Character.exists_ne_one_of_ne_one hŌá))‚ĀĽ¬Ļ) *
          Ōá (Classical.choose (Character.exists_ne_one_of_ne_one hŌá)) =
          (1 : ‚Ąā) * Ōá (Classical.choose (Character.exists_ne_one_of_ne_one hŌá)) := by
        simpa [hEq]
      have : (1 : ‚Ąā) * Ōá (Classical.choose (Character.exists_ne_one_of_ne_one hŌá)) = (1 : ‚Ąā) := by
        exact hleft.trans hmul
      simpa using this
    exact (Classical.choose_spec (Character.exists_ne_one_of_ne_one hŌá)) hpoint
  let a : G := (Classical.choose (Character.exists_ne_one_of_ne_one hŌá))‚ĀĽ¬Ļ
  have hmul_sum : (Ōá a : ‚Ąā) * S = S := by
    calc
      (Ōá a : ‚Ąā) * S
          = (Ōá a : ‚Ąā) * ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) := by rfl
      _ = ‚ąĎ g : G, ((Ōá a : ‚Ąā) * (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)) := by
            simp [mul_sum]
      _ = ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá (a * g) : ‚Ąā) := by
            refine Finset.sum_congr rfl ?_
            intro g hg
            simpa using (Ōá.map_mul a g).symm
      _ = ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) := by
            simpa using
              (Fintype.sum_bijective (fun g : G => a * g) (by
                intro x y hxy
                exact mul_left_cancel hxy)
                (by
                  intro y
                  refine ‚ü®a‚ĀĽ¬Ļ * y, ?_‚ü©
                  simp [mul_assoc]))
      _ = S := by rfl
  have hŌáa_eq_one : (Ōá a : ‚Ąā) = 1 := by
    apply mul_right_cancel‚āÄ hS
    simpa [hS] using hmul_sum
  exact hŌá_ne_one_at_inv (by simpa [a] using hŌáa_eq_one)
```

theorem candidate_T1_free (Ōá : Character G) (hŌá : Ōá ‚Č† 1) :
    ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) = 0 := by
  classical
  by_contra hsum
  set S : ‚Ąā := ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)
  have hS : S ‚Č† 0 := by simpa [S] using hsum
  have hŌá1 : ‚ąÄ h : G, Ōá h = 1 := by
    intro h
    have hmul : (Ōá h : ‚Ąā) * S = S := by
      calc
        (Ōá h : ‚Ąā) * S
            = (Ōá h : ‚Ąā) * ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) := by simp [S]
        _ = ‚ąĎ g : G, ((Ōá h : ‚Ąā) * (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)) := by
              rw [Finset.mul_sum]
        _ = ‚ąĎ g : G, ((Ōá (h * g) : ‚Ąā)) := by
              refine Finset.sum_congr rfl ?_
              intro g hg
              simp [map_mul]
        _ = ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) := by
              simpa using (Fintype.sum_bijective (f := fun g : G => h * g) (by
                intro a b hab
                exact mul_left_cancel hab))
        _ = S := by simp [S]
    have : ((Ōá h : ‚Ąā) - 1) * S = 0 := by
      nlinarith [hmul]
    have hŌáh : (Ōá h : ‚Ąā) - 1 = 0 := by
      exact sub_eq_zero.mp (eq_of_mul_eq_mul_right (by simpa using hS) (by simpa [sub_mul] using this))
    exact Subtype.ext (sub_eq_zero.mp hŌáh)
  have : Ōá = 1 := by
    ext h
    exact hŌá1 h
  exact hŌá this
```
